# Description

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue)

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case or scenario does it improve?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` — no diffs
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` — no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` — all tests pass
- [ ] New functionality has tests
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in `docs/api-reference.md`
- [ ] User-visible changes are noted in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] PR description explains *what* changed and *why*

## Testing

Describe the testing you performed to verify your changes.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots for GUI changes.
